hadiths.en:
Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad al-Jawhari narrated from Ali ibn Abi Hamzah: 
I read in a man's letter to Abu al -Hasan {a.s} about a man who married a woman in 
Mut'ah (temporary marriage) for a specified period. When the term between them 
ended, he asked whether it was permissible for him to marry her sister.  
Imam {a.s} replied: "It is not permissible for him until her waiting period ( 'iddah) has 
ended." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.463 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4603
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٣

hadiths.ar:
4605  -  وَّ رَّوَّى مُّوسَّى ن ْن ُّ ن َّكْزٍ عَّن ْ ر ُّرَّإرَّة َّ ق َّالَّ سَّمِعْث ُّ إ َّن َّا ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّق ُّول وَّ إ َّرْن َّعُّون َّ 
ي َّوْماً اً
طَّلاَّق ٍ  
ق َّا ِن ْ س َّاءَّ إ َّن ْ ي َّز ِي ذَّ ق َّلَّا ن ُّذ َّ مِن ْ إ َّن ْ ي ُّصْذِق َّهَّا س َّي ْن اً ق َّل َّ إ َّوْ كَّي ُّزَّ  وَّ إلص َّذَّإق ُّ كُّل ُّ س َّى ْ ءٍ ي َّزَّإص َّي َّا عَّلَّي ْهِ ق ِى  ي َّمَّي  ُّغٍ إ َّوْ ي َّز ْوِي ح ٍ ن ِع َّي ْزِ مُّي ْعَّه ٍ وَّ 
لَّأ مِي زَّإب َّ ن َّي ْن َّهُّمَّا ق ِى  إلْمُّي ْعَّه ِ إ ِذ َّإ مَّاب َّ وَّإجِذ  مِن ْهُّمَّا ق ِى  ذ َّلِك َّ إلْأ َّج َّلِ  وَّ لَّهُّ إ َّن ْ ي َّي َّمَّي  َّغَّ إ ِن ْ س َّاءَّ وَّ لَّهُّ إمْزَّإ َّة   وَّ إ ِن ْ كَّان َّ مُّق ِي ماً مَّعَّهَّا ق ِى  
مِصْزِةِ .
hadiths.en:
Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Nasr asked al -Ridha {a.s} about a man who 
marries a woman in Mut'ah (temporary marriage). 
Is it permissible for him to marry her daughter permanently?  
Imam {a.s} replied: "No." 
[REFERENCES] Qurb Al-Isnad, Vol.1 p.366 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.463 • Tafsir Al -Safi, Vol.1 
p.436 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4604
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٤

hadiths.ar:
4606  -  وَّ رَّوَّى صَّق ْوَّإن ُّ ن ْن ُّ ي َّحْي َّى عَّن ْ عَّن ْذِ إَّلز َّجْمَّن ِ ن ْن ِ إَّلْحَّح  َّاح ِ ق َّالَّ: سَّا َّلْث ُّ إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّل س َّلاَّمُّ عَّن ِ إَّلْمَّزْإ َّة ِ 
ي َّي َّز َّو َّج ُّهَّا إَّلز َّج ُّلُّ مُّي ْعَّه ً ي ُّم َّ  ي ُّي َّوَّق  َّى عَّن ْهَّا هَّلْ عَّلَّي ْهَّا إَّلْعِذ َّة ُّ ق َّال وَّ هُّوَّ 
جَّى    ق َّحَّي ْص َّه   وَّ ن ِصْف   مِي ْلَّ مَّا ي َّح ِث ُّ عَّلَّى إَّلْأ َّمَّه ِ ةُّ ي َّوْماً إ َّوْ ي َّوْمَّي ْن ِ إ َّوْ 
سَّاعَّه ً مِن َّ إَّلن  َّهَّارِ ق َّق َّذْ وَّج َّن َّث ِ إَّلْعِذ َّة ُّ وَّ لأَّ ي ُّحِذ
hadiths.en:
Musa ibn Bakr narrated from Zurara, who said:  
I heard Abu Ja’far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s} saying: 
"The waiting period ('Iddah) for Mut'ah (temporary marriage) is forty-five days." 
Imam {a.s} then demonstrated by holding up his hand and showing forty -five days. 
"When the specified term ends, the separation occurs without the need for divorce."  
[AL SADUQ] 
If he wishes to extend the term, he must provide her with another dowry ( Sadaq), 
whether small or large, as mutually agreed upon. 
The dowry applies to both Mut'ah and permanent marriage. 
There is no inheritance between them in Mut'ah if one of them dies during the specified 
term. 
It is permissible for a man to contract Mut'ah even if he has a wife and is residing with 
her in the same city. 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol. 5 p.458 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.464 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 23 p.1237 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.52 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4605
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٥

hadiths.ar:
4607  -  وَّ رَّوَّى عُّمَّزُّ ن ْن ُّ إ ُّذ َّي ْن َّه َّ عَّن ْ ر ُّرَّإرَّة َّ ق َّالَّ: سَّا َّلْث ُّ إ َّن َّا ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ مَّا عِذ َّة ُّ إَّلْمُّي ْعَّه ِ إ ِذ َّإ مَّاب َّ  عَّن ْهَّا إَّل َّذ ِى  ي َّمَّي  َّغَّ 
ن ِهَّا ق َّال  عَّن ْهَّا إَّلز  َّوْح ُّ ق َّعَّلَّى إَّلْمَّزْإ َّة ِ جُّز َّة ً كَّان َّث ْ إ َّوْ إ َّمَّه ً 
إ َّوْ عَّلَّى إ َّى ِّ وَّج ْهٍ كَّان َّ إَّلن ِّكَّاحُّ مِن ْهُّ مُّي ْعَّه ً إ َّوْ ي َّز ْوِي ح اً إ َّوْ مِلْك َّ ي َّمِي ن ٍ ق َّالْعِذ َّة ُّ إ َّرْن َّعَّه ُّ إ َّس ْهُّزٍ  وَّ عَّس ْزإً وَّ عِذ َّة ُّ إَّلْمُّطَّل َّق َّه ِ ي َّلاَّي َّه ُّ 
إ َّس ْهُّزٍ وَّ  إَّلْأ َّمَّه ُّ إَّلْمُّطَّل َّق َّه ُّ عَّلَّي ْهَّا ن ِصْف ُّ مَّا عَّلَّى إَّلْحُّز َّة ِ وَّ كَّذ َّلِك َّ إَّلْمُّي ْعَّه ُّ عَّلَّي ْهَّا مِي ْلُّ مَّا عَّلَّى إَّلْأ َّمَّ ه ِ
hadiths.en:
Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Abdur-Rahman ibn Al-Hajjaj, who said: 
I asked Abu Abdullah {a.s} about a woman who entered into a Mut'ah (temporary 
marriage) and then her husband passed away. 
Imam {a.s} said: "She must observe an 'Iddah (waiting period) of four months and ten 
days." 
Then Imam {a.s} continued: "If her term ends while he is still alive, her waiting period is 
one and a half menstrual cycles, similar to what is required for a female slave."  
I asked: "Does she need to observe mourning (Hadd)?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: "Yes, but if she stayed with him for a day, two days, or even just an 
hour during the day, the waiting period becomes obligatory, but mourning ( Hadd) is 
not required." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.464 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.8 p.157 • Al-Istibsar, Vol.3 
p.350 • Al-Wafi, Vol.23 p.1238 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.22 p.275 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4606
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٦

hadiths.ar:
4608   -  : وَّ ق ِي ل لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ لِمَّ ج َّعَّلَّ ق ِى  إَّلز ِّن َّا إ َّرْن َّعَّه ً مِن َّ إَّلس  ُّهُّوذِ وَّ ق ِى  إَّلْق َّي ْلِ س َّاهِذَّي ْ ن ِ ق َّال 
إَّلل َّهَّ ي َّن َّارَّك َّ وَّ ي َّعَّالَّى إ َّجَّل َّ لَّكُّمُّ إَّلْمُّي ْعَّه َّ وَّ عَّلِمَّ إ َّن  َّهَّا سَّي ُّن ْكَّزُّ عَّلَّي ْكُّمْ ق َّح َّعَّلَّ إَّلْأ َّ رْن َّعَّه َّ إَّلس  ُّهُّوذِ إِجْي ِي َّاطاً لَّكُّمْ وَّ لَّوْ لأَّ ذ َّلِك َّ  
لَّأ ُّي ِى َّ عَّلَّي ْكُّمْ وَّ ق َّل َّ مَّا ي َّح ْي َّمِغُّ إ َّرْن َّعَّه   عَّلَّى س َّهَّاذَّة ٍ ن ِا َّمْزٍ وَّإجِذٍ
hadiths.en:
Umar ibn Udhaynah narrated from Zurara, who said:  
I asked Abu Ja’far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s} about the waiting period 
('Iddah) for a woman in a Mut'ah (temporary marriage) if her husband passes away. 
Imam {a.s} replied: "It is four months and ten days." 
Then Imam {a.s} continued: 
"O Zurara, for every type of marriage  - whether the woman is free or a slave, and 
regardless of whether the marriage was permanent ( Nikah), temporary ( Mut'ah), or 
through ownership (Milk Yamin) - if the husband dies, the waiting period ('Iddah) is four 
months and ten days." 
"However, the waiting period ('Iddah) for a divorced woman is three months, and for a 
divorced female slave, it is half the waiting period of a free woman. Similarly, the 
waiting period ('Iddah) for a woman in Mut'ah is the same as that for a female slave." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.465 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.8 p.157 • Al-Istibsar, Vol.3 
p.350 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.3 p.345 • Al-Wafi, Vol.23 p.1239 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.22 p.275 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4607
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٧

hadiths.ar:
4609   -  وَّ رُّوِى َّ عَّن ْ ن َّك َّارِ ن ْن ِ كَّزْذَّمٍ ق َّالَّ: ق ُّلْث ُّ لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إَّلز َّج ُّلُّ ي َّلْق َّى إَّلْمَّزْإ ة َّ ق َّي َّق ُّولُّ لَّهَّا ر َّوِّج ِي ن ِى   
ن َّق ْسَّك ِ س َّهْزإً وَّ لأَّ ي ُّسَّمِّى  إَّلس  َّهْزَّ ن ِعَّي ْن ِهِ ق َّي َّلْق َّاهَّا ن َّعْذَّ سِن ِي ن َّ ق َّق َّال س َّهْزُّةُّ إ ِن ْ كَّان َّ سَّم َّاةُّ وَّ إ ِن ْ لَّمْ ي َّكُّن ْ سَّم َّاةُّ ق َّلاَّ  
سَّن ِي لَّ لَّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهَّا
hadiths.en:
It was said to Abu Abdullah {a.s}: "Why has Allah {SWT} prescribed four witnesses 
for proving adultery (Zina) and only two witnesses for proving murder?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: "Indeed, Allah {SWT}, the Blessed and Exalted, has made Mut'ah 
(temporary marriage) lawful for you, and He {SWT} knew that it would be denied and 
rejected by people. Therefore, He {SWT} required four witnesses as a precaution for you. 
Had it not been for this requirement, people would have accused you unjustly. And it 
is rare for four people to come together and testify about the same matter."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.465 • Ilal Al-Shara’i’, Vol.2 p.509 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.76 
p.38 • Bihar Al -Anwar, Vol.101 p.301 • Tafsir Nur Al -Thaqalayn, Vol.3 p.573 • Tafsir Kanz Al -Daqaiq, Vol.9 
p.247 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4608
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٨

hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Bakkar bin Kardam, who said:  
I asked Abu Abdullah {a.s}: "A man meets a woman and says to her, 'Marry me to yourself 
for a month,' but he does not specify which month. Then he meets her again after 
several years - does he still have his month?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: "He has his month if he had specified it. However, if he did not specify 
it, then he has no claim over her." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol. 5 p.466 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.465 • Tahdhib Al -Ahkam, Vol.7 
p.267 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.667 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.72 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4609
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦٠٩

hadiths.ar:
4611  -  وَّ رَّوَّى عَّلِى  ُّ ن ْن ُّ إ َّسْن َّاطٍ عَّن ْ مُّحَّم َّذِ ن ْن ِ عُّذ َّإق ِزٍ عَّم َّن ْ ذ َّكَّزَّةُّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم  ق َّالَّ:  سَّا َّلْي ُّهُّ عَّن ِ 
إَّلي  َّمَّي  ُّغِ ن ِالْأ َّن ْكَّارِ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Zur'ah, from Sama'ah, who said:  
I asked him about a man who took a bondwoman for temporary marriage but forgot 
and had intercourse with her. Does he deserve the punishment of a fornicator?  
Imam {a.s} replied: "No, but he should perform the temporary marriage contract with 
her again and seek forgiveness from Allah {SWT} for what he has done." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol. 5 p.466 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.466 • Tahdhib Al -Ahkam, Vol.7 
p.479 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.667 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.74 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4610
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١٠

hadiths.ar:
4612  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إ ِسْحَّاق ُّ ن ْن ُّ عَّم َّارٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّالَّ: ق ُّلْث ُّ لَّهُّ رَّج ُّل  ي َّز َّو َّح َّ ن ِح َّارِي ه ٍ عَّاي ِق ٍ عَّلَّى إ َّن ْ لأَّ 
ي َّق ْي َّص  َّهَّا ي ُّم َّ إ َّذ ِن َّث ْ لَّهُّ ن َّعْذَّ ذ َّلِك َّ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Ali ibn Asbat, from Muhammad ibn Udhafir, from someone 
he mentioned, who said: I asked Abu Abdullah {a.s} about engaging in temporary 
marriage with virgins. 
Imam {a.s} replied: "Was it not made permissible except for them? So let them observe 
modesty and chastity." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.466 • Al-Wafi, Vol.21 p.358 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.21 
p.33 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4611
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١١

hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Ishaq in Ammar, who said: 
I said to Abu Abdullah {a.s}: A man married a young bondwoman with the condition that 
he would not deflower her. Then afterward, she gave him permission. 
Imam {a.s} replied: "If she gave him permission, then there is no harm in it.”  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.466 • Tahdhib Al -Ahkam, Vol.7 p.369 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 
p.666 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.33 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4612
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١٢

hadiths.ar:
4614  -  وَّ رُّوِى َّ عَّن ْ ج َّان ِزِ ن ْن ِ عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ إَّلْأ َّن ْصَّارِى ِّ : إ َّن  َّ رَّسُّولَّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ ج َّطَّث  إَّلن  َّاسَّ ق َّق َّال 
إَّلن  َّاسُّ إ ِن  َّ إَّلل َّهَّ ي َّن َّارَّك َّ وَّ  ي َّعَّالَّى إ َّجَّل َّ لَّكُّمُّ إَّلْق ُّزُّوح َّ عَّلَّى ي َّلاَّي َّه ِ مَّعَّان ٍ ق َّزْح ِ مَّوْرُّوب ٍ وَّ هُّوَّ إَّلْن َّي َّاب ُّ وَّ ق َّزْح ِ ع َّي ْزِ مَّوْرُّوب ٍ وَّ   
هُّوَّ إَّلْمُّي ْعَّه ُّ وَّ مِلْك ِ إ َّي ْمَّان ِكُّمْ
hadiths.en:
It is narrated: "A believer does not attain completeness until he practices 
Mut'ah." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.466 • Al-Wafi, Vol.21 p.343 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.21 
p.14 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4613
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١٣

hadiths.ar:
4615  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم لَّأ َّكْزَّةُّ لِلز َّج ُّلِ إ َّن ْ ي َّمُّوب َّ وَّ ق َّذْ ن َّق ِي َّث ْ عَّلَّي ْهِ ج َّل َّه   مِن ْ ج ِلاَّلِ رَّسُّولِ إَّلل َّهِ 
صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ لَّمْ ي َّا ْي ِهَّا  إ لِهِ ق َّال هَّذ ِةِ إَّلْأ ي َّه 
۝ وَّ إ ِذ ْ إ َّسَّز َّ إَّلن  َّن ِى  ُّ إ ِلىٰ ن َّعْض ِ إ َّر ْوٰإج ِهِ جَّذِي ي اً ۝ إ ِلَّى ق َّوْلِهِ ي َّعَّالَّى ۝  ي َّي ِّن ٰاب ٍ وَّ إ َّن ْكٰارإً ۝  »
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah Al -Ansari that: 
The Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, 
addressed the people and said: “O people, indeed Allah {SWT}, the Blessed and Exalted, 
has made permissible for you intimate relations in three forms: an inherited 
relationship, which is permanent (Nikah); a non -inherited relationship, which is 
Mut'ah; and what your right hands possess (slavery)."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.466 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4614
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١٤

hadiths.ar:
4616  -  وَّ رَّوَّى عَّن ْذُّ إَّلل َّهِ ن ْن ُّ سِن َّان ٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال مَّ عَّلَّى س ِي عَّي ِن َّا  
إَّلْمُّسْكِزَّ مِن ْ كُّلِّ س َّزَّإب ٍ وَّ عَّو َّص َّهُّمْ مِن ْ ذ َّلِك َّ إَّلْمُّي ْعَّه
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s}, said: 
"Indeed, I dislike for a man to die while there remains a Sunnah of the practices of the 
Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, that he did 
not act upon." 
I said to him: "Did the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace and blessings be upon him and 
his family, perform Mut'ah?" 
He replied: "Yes," and then recited this verse: 
“'And [remember] when the Prophet confided to one of his wives a statement'… to His 
saying: 'widowed and virgins'” (Surah Al-Tahrim 66:3-5). 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 3 p.466 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol. 21 p.13 • Al -Fusul Al -
Muhimmah, Vol.1 p.651 • Tafsir Al-Burhan, Vol.5 p.420 • Tafsir Nur Al-Thaqalayn, Vol.5 p.369 • Tafsir Kanz 
Al-Daqaiq, Vol.13 p.327 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4615
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١٥

hadiths.en:
Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Abu Abdillah {a.s} who said: "Indeed, Allah 
{SWT}, Blessed and Exalted, has forbidden all intoxicating drinks for our Shia and has 
compensated them with mut'ah (temporary marriage)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.467 • Khilasat Al-Ijaz, Vol.1 p.42 • Khilasat Al-Ijaz, Vol.1 
p.9 • Al-Wafi, Vol.21 p.344 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.7 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.306 • Mustadrak Al-
Wasa’il, Vol.14 p.452 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.17 p.61

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 140, H. 4616
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤٠، ح ٤٦١٦

hadiths.en:
Isma'il ibn Muslim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} 
from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s}, from his forefathers (peace be 
upon them) that the Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:  
"It is not permissible for a woman who is menstruating to adopt a qussah (a specific 
type of cloth) or a jummah (a certain hairstyle or wig)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.467 • Al -Adab Al-Diniyyah, Vol.1 p.114 • Makarim Al -
Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.85 • Al-Sarair, Vol.3 p.610 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.855 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.186 • Bihar 
Al-Anwar, Vol.73 p.106 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 141, H. 4617
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤١، ح ٤٦١٧

hadiths.ar: 4619 - وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم إَّلْمَّزْإ َّة ُّ مَّح ْلِساً ق َّق َّامَّث ْ عَّن ْهُّ ق َّلاَّ ي َّح ْلِسُّ ق ِى  مَّح ْلِسِهَّا إ َّجَّذ  جَّي  َّى ي َّن ْزُّذ
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "May Allah have mercy on the Musarwalat (those who wear 
trousers or are modestly covered)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.467 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.856 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 141, H. 4618
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤١، ح ٤٦١٨

hadiths.ar:
4620  -  وَّ رَّوَّى مُّحَّم َّذُّ ن ْن ُّ مُّسْلِمٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال هْوَّة َّ عَّس َّزَّة َّ إ َّج ْز َّإءٍ 
ي ِسْعَّه ً ق ِى  إَّلزِّج َّالِ وَّ وَّإجِذَّة ً ق ِى  إَّلن ِّسَّاءِ  
وَّ ذ َّلِك َّ لِن َّن ِى  هَّاس ِمٍ وَّ س ِي عَّي ِهِمْ وَّ ق ِى  ن ِسَّاءِ ن َّن ِى  إ ُّمَّي  َّه َّ وَّ س ِي عَّي ِهِمْ إلس  َّهْوَّة ُّ عَّس َّزَّة ُّ إ َّج ْز َّإءٍ ق ِى  إلن ِّ سَّاءِ ي ِسْعَّه   وَّ ق ِى  إلزِّج َّالِ وَّإجِذَّة  .
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "When a woman leaves her seat, no one should sit in her place 
until it has cooled down." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.467 • Al-Adab Al-Diniyyah, Vol.1 p.114 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 141, H. 4619
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤١، ح ٤٦١٩

hadiths.en:
Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Abu Ja’far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali 
Al-Baqir {a.s} who said:  
"Indeed, Allah {SWT}, the Almighty and Glorious, created desire in ten parts, nine parts 
in men and one part in women." 
[AL SADUQ] 
This applies to the descendants of Banu Hashim and their followers. However, in the 
women of Banu Umayyah and their followers, desire is created in ten parts, nine parts 
in women and one part in men. 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.467 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 141, H. 4620
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤١، ح ٤٦٢٠

hadiths.en:
Jabir narrated from Abu Ja’far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s} that he 
said: "Regarding women, do not consult them in confidential matters, and do not obey 
them in matters concerning relatives. 
When a woman grows old, the better half of her qualities departs, and the worse half 
remains, her beauty fades, her tongue becomes sharper, and her womb becomes 
barren. 
However, when a man grows old, the worse half of his qualities departs, and the better 
half remains, his intellect becomes more steadfast, his judgment more firm, and his 
ignorance decreases." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.468 • Al -Adab Al-Diniyyah, Vol.1 p.114 • Makarim Al -
Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.231 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.804 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.227 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 141, H. 4621
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤١، ح ٤٦٢١

hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said: "Any man who is ruled by a woman is cursed." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol. 5 p.518 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 3 p.468 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 22 p.803 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.182 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.228 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 141, H. 4622
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٤١، ح ٤٦٢٢
